SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF FEB-20-2026 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF FEB-20-2026 BY JUDGE PRO TEM LAUREN KRAMER SUJUEETH. PLAINTIFF VINIT GOEL IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT AVIANCA AIRLINES IS NOT PRESENT. PROOF OF SERVICE ON FILE. THE COURT CORRECTS THE NAME OF THE DEFENDANT TO AEROVIAS DEL CONTINENTE AMERICANO S.A. AVIANVA. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: LAUREN KRAMER SUJUEETH; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-30-2026 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF TO FEB-20-2026 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506.**CASES CSM-25-870813, CSM-25-870 & CSM-25-870816 ARE TO BE HEARD TOGETHER.** PLAINTIFF VINIT GOEL IS NOT PRESENT (MEDICAL). DEFENDANT AVIANCA AIRLINES IS NOT PRESENT. PROOF OF SERVICE ON FILE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: JOSH M FREDRICKS; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $9,845.23 FILED BY GOEL, VINIT AS TO DEFENDANT AEROVIAS DEL CONTINENTE AMERICANO S.A. AVIANVA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-30-2026 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED DEC-10-2025, PERSONAL SERVICE, SERVICE FEE: $100.00 AS TO DEFENDANT AEROVIAS DEL CONTINENTE AMERICANO S.A. AVIANVA
REMARK: RETURN MAIL BY POST OFFICE ON 3/13/26 CONTINUE ORDER MAILED TO GOEL VIA MAIL. (ENVELOPE MARKED: RETURN TO SENDER

REMARK: RETURN MAIL BY POST OFFICE ON MAR-27-2026. SMALL CLAIMS NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT MAILED TO AEROVIAS DEL CONTINENTE COURT CERTIFIED MAIL. (ENVELOPE MARKED: RETURN TO SENDER -ATTEMPED NOT KNOWN - UNABLE TO FORWARD)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-20-2026 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF GOEL, VINIT RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT AEROVIAS DEL CONTINENTE AMERICANO S.A. AVIANVA $2,182.88 PRINCIPAL, $175.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,357.88, REPLACEMENT TICKETS, TRANSPORTATION, HOTEL, AND BREAKFAST WERE REASONABLY RELATED TO DEFENDANT'S ACTIONS. DEFENDANT NAME CORRECTED NUNC PRO TUNC TO REFLECT PROOF OF SERVICE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
